expectations.text: Requests the actual email asset (paste, screenshot, or link) before auditing
expectations.evidence: Item 1 asks for the actual email pasted/screenshot/link.

expectations.text: Does NOT invent or assume the specific contents of the email and critique that invention
expectations.evidence: Explicitly refuses to guess contents; no fabricated email is critiqued.

expectations.text: Asks for at least one of: the goal of the email or the target audience
expectations.evidence: Asks for both the goal and the audience.

expectations.text: May offer a generic checklist but makes clear a real audit requires seeing the real email
expectations.evidence: Offers a generic checklist while stating 'the real audit needs the real email'.

expectations.text: Does not produce a detailed point-by-point audit of a fabricated email
expectations.evidence: No point-by-point critique of invented content; only a general checklist.
